Security tip: Domain Breakdown

Understanding the exam domains and their weights is critical for efficient study planning. Focus more time on heavily-weighted domains while ensuring you cover all areas. Domain 1: Security Operations...

- 1.1 Explain the importance of system and network architecture concepts
- 1.2 Analyze indicators of potentially malicious activity
- 1.3 Use appropriate tools or techniques to determine malicious activity
- 1.4 Compare and contrast threat intelligence and threat hunting concepts

instagram.caption:
Security tip: Recommended Study Timeline

Plan for approximately 6-10 weeks of dedicated study. Here is a suggested weekly breakdown: Week 1: Domain 1: Security Operations — Network architecture, Log analysis, SIEM Week 2: Domain 1: Threat In...

- Week 1: Domain 1: Security Operations — Network architecture, Log analysis, SIEM
- Week 2: Domain 1: Threat Intelligence — IOCs, MITRE ATT&CK, Threat hunting
- Week 3: Domain 1: Malicious Activity — Malware analysis, Network anomalies, Emai
- Week 4: Domain 2: Vulnerability Scanning — Tools, Techniques, Credentialed vs No
